title: Agent CI/CD board task (v1)
description: One task on the agent-conductor control-plane board. Mirrors a GitHub Project v2 item; field set is the source of truth for the daemon, validator, and migration scripts.

status.description: Lifecycle state. See the state machine in 2026-05-18-agent-cicd-control-plane.md.

lane.description: Coordination lane: foundation = touches shared types/migrations/contracts; leaf = isolated feature; integration = wires foundation to leaves.

track.description: Stable slug identifying the track. Maps 1:1 to team/contracts/<track>.md.

owner_agent.description: Identifier of the agent or operator holding this task. Empty when unclaimed. Convention: '<instance.name>:<host>' for daemons, free text for human operators.

branch.description: Git branch carrying this task's commits. Conventionally '<config.branch.prefix><track>'.

worktree.description: Path to the local git worktree for this task, relative to repo root. Conventionally '<config.paths.worktreeRoot>/<track>'.

pr.description: GitHub PR number once opened. Null before PR_OPEN; remains set through ARCHIVED.

review_status.description: Aggregate PR review state derived from the configured review bots.

deploy_status.description: Deploy workflow state. Phase 3; remains 'none' through Phase 1 and 2.

intake_doc.description: Path to the intake/spec/QA report this track was decomposed from.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the Issue was created. Mirrors GH-native field.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last field change. Mirrors GH-native field.
